_metadata.description: Reviewed exact-identity redirects across pipeline registries.
_metadata.purpose: Reviewed exact-identity redirects across pipeline registries.
_metadata.policy: Only exact same-substance records may be redirected. Parent, form, preparation, and context relationships require separate handling.

equivalences.basis: Shared FDA UNII U182GP2CF3 and identical canonical substance.
Shared FDA UNII XDD2WEC9L5 and same Malpighia acerola source; the other-ingredient row is a duplicate natural-ingredient record.
Shared FDA UNII BQY1UBX046; both records describe Sambucus nigra fruit, not elderflower.
The inactive carrier record and active MCT record describe the same medium-chain-triglyceride substance; the IQM canonical is used for active scoring.
Shared FDA UNII 2UMI9U37CP and same oleic-acid identity.
Shared FDA UNII ETJ7Z6XBU4 and same silicon-dioxide identity; additive classification remains owned by the other-ingredient record.
Both records describe Vaccinium corymbosum fruit/whole-fruit powder and share CUI C1027331; the blueberry record also carries the verified FDA UNII 253RUG1X1A.
